backstory.original: Imoen is a surprisingly cheerful young woman considering she eventually discovered that she was the child of a deadly murder god. As an orphan, she moved to Candlekeep at the age of 10 with her adoptive father and innkeeper, Winthrop. She eventually traveled to Baldur's Gate with a childhood friend, where she joined forces with powerful Champions like Minsc and Jaheira.
backstory.display: 尽管最终发现自己是某个致命杀神的孩子，但伊梦依然是个极其活泼的年轻女子。作为一名孤儿，她在 10 岁时和养父兼旅店老板温斯洛普一起搬到了烛堡。后来，她与一位儿时好友一起来到博德之门，并在那里与明斯克和贾希拉等强大的勇士队成为盟友。

description.original: Imoen shoots a random enemy with her bow.
description.display: 伊梦使用弓箭射击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Imoen attacks five enemies, hitting each 5 times. She prioritizes hits-based enemies.
description.display: 伊梦攻击五名敌人，每名攻击 5 次。她优先瞄准命中次数型敌人。

longDescription.original: Imoen leaps out into the fray, attacking five enemies in sequence with her short sword in one hand and her lockpicks in the other. She prioritizes enemies with hits-based health and deals 5 hits per attack; if no hits-based enemies are available she deals normal ultimate damage to enemies she attacks.
longDescription.display: 伊梦跃入鏖战中心，一手持短剑，一手握开锁器，依次攻击五名敌人。她优先瞄准命中型生命值的敌人，每次攻击造成 5 次命中；如果没有命中型敌人，则对所攻击的敌人造成普通的杀招伤害。

description.original: Imoen increases her support buffs when Favored Foes appear or are defeated
description.display: 当偏好对手出现或被击败时，伊梦的支援增益效果提高

description.original: Before every third attack, Imoen polymorphs a non-boss enemy into her Favored Foe.
description.display: 每发动三次攻击之前，伊梦将一个非首领的敌人变形为她的偏好对手。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $(amount)%.

tipText.original: Imoen buffs the champions adjacent to her.
tipText.display: 伊梦为与她相邻的勇士们提供增益。

description.desc: Beast enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Beast enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
兽类敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对兽类敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying beasts, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀兽类，她对兽类的伤害提高。

description.desc: Dragon enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Dragon enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
龙族敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对龙族敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying dragons, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀龙族，她对龙族的伤害提高。

description.desc: Monstrosity enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Monstrosity enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
怪兽敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对怪兽敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying monstrosities, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀怪兽，她对怪兽的伤害提高。

description.desc: Aberration enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Aberration enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
异怪敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对异怪敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying aberrations, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀异怪，她对异怪的伤害提高。

description.desc: Any time any Champion's Favored Foe appears or is defeated, $(source_hero) increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively and then applying multiplicatively. Stacks up to $(max_stacks) times. Stacks are reset each time the Champions change areas.
每当任意勇士的偏好对手出现或被击败时，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效。最多可堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层。每次勇士变更区域时，堆叠都会重置。

tipText.original: Imoen increases her buff any time a Favored Foe appears or is defeated.
tipText.display: 每当偏好对手出现或被击败时，伊梦的增益效果提高。

description.pre: Before every eighth attack, or upon entering a new area, $(source_hero) casts Stoneskin on all Champions in the front-most column of the formation, granting them $(not_buffed amount) temporary hit points. The amount is increased by 5% (additively) for each Favored Foe that is alive.
每发动八次攻击之前，或进入新区域时，$(source_hero)对阵型最前列的所有勇士施放石肤术，使其获得 $(not_buffed amount) 点临时生命值。每个存活的偏好对手均使此数值提高 5%（以加算方式堆叠）。

description.desc: Before every third attack, $(source_hero) polymorphs a random non-boss non-static enemy into a monster with the same type as her Favored Foe, but only 10% of its original health. She can not polymorph enemies that are already polymorphed by this ability a second time.
每发动三次攻击之前，$(source_hero)将一名随机非首领非静态敌人变形为一只怪物，并与她的偏好对手类型相同，但只有其原始生命值的 10%。她不能将已被此技能变形的敌人二次变形。

description.original: I'll sneak in first.
description.display: 我先溜进去。

description.original: I don't know why you're following me, but if we're doing this, let's go!
description.display: 我不知道你们为什么追随我，但如果势在必行，那就开干吧！

description.original: Have you heard the one about the giant space hamster?
description.display: 你听说过巨型太空仓鼠的故事吗？

description.original: Did I ever tell you about the time I climbed up Candlekeep's tower?
description.display: 我有说过我爬上烛堡高塔的故事吗？

description.original: I'm me. Imoen. And I'd like to stay that way.
description.display: 我就是我。伊梦。我很乐意保持下去。

description.original: I just pick myself up and carry on.
description.display: 我会振作精神，继续前进。

description.original: I'll give you a little boost!
description.display: 我来给你加把劲。

description.original: Those arrows won't stop coming, so let's make it harder for them.
description.display: 那些箭不会自动停止，那就给它们设置障碍吧。

description.original: What do you mean, I'm stronger than I look? I look plenty strong!
description.display: 什么叫我比看起来更强壮？我看起来就很强壮！

description.original: It could be worse!
description.display: 这不是最糟的！

description.original: Well this is curious AND terrifying...
description.display: 嗯，这还真是既有意思又可怕……

description.original: I'll never give up the fight!
description.display: 我永远不会放弃战斗！

description.original: Ah, fond memories.
description.display: 啊，多么美好的回忆。

description.original: I grew up among the monks of Candlekeep, but that doesn't mean I didn't train.
description.display: 我在烛堡的武僧中长大，但这并不意味着我没有受过训练。

description.original: Sometimes the best defense is a sword you're ready to use.
description.display: 有时候最好的防御是你随时准备使用的剑。

description.original: Everything's better with some magic added in!
description.display: 加点魔法，一切都会更好！

description.original: I used to practice by aiming at empty inkpots!
description.display: 我以前常常瞄准空墨水瓶练习射击！

description.original: I won't say I was a prodigy, but I was no slouch with the bow.
description.display: 我不准备自称神童，但我对弓箭并不陌生。

description.original: Let's start with an arrow before we move on to magic missiles.
description.display: 先从射箭开始，以后再讨论魔法飞弹。

description.original: I don't know of a shortbow more powerful than this one.
description.display: 我没见过比它更厉害的短弓。

description.original: If you aim just right, you can get it to stick on a monk's forehead!
description.display: 如果你瞄得够准，就能把它贴在武僧的额头上！

description.original: They don't let kids in Candlekeep have sharp weapons.
description.display: 他们不允许烛堡的孩子拥有锋利的武器。

description.original: Always keep it full, in case you don't want to waste a spell.
description.display: 如果不想浪费法术，那就记得把它装满。

description.original: I have one for beasts, one for dragons, one for aberrations, one for monstrosities...
description.display: 一支给兽类，一支给龙族，一支给异怪，一支给怪兽......

description.original: The first time I found one of these, I thought maybe there was a funny story in it.
description.display: 第一次找到这种卷轴时，我以为里面写着有趣的故事。

description.original: There's something about magic that calls to me.
description.display: 我对魔法有一种感应。

description.original: The cocoons are cheap, but seasonal. The diamond dust is year-round but PRICY.
description.display: 茧很便宜，但有季节性。钻石尘虽然全年有货，但价格昂贵。

description.original: I've so many good spells in here.
description.display: 这里记着很多好用的法术。

description.original: When you don't give a child lockpicks, they start experimenting.
description.display: 如果不给孩子开锁器，他们就会自己实验。

description.original: You can pick a lock with a sewing needle if you're patient. And the lock's not great.
description.display: 你可以用缝纫针撬开一把锁，只要有耐心。并且锁不复杂。

description.original: I've got everything I need here.
description.display: 我需要的一切都在身上。

description.original: There's not a lock made I can't crack with these.
description.display: 借助这些工具，世上没有我打不开的锁。

description.original: This old thing? I probably stole it.
description.display: 这件旧东西？可能是我偷的。

description.original: Some memories are private. I'll tell you later.
description.display: 有些回忆非常私密。我以后再告诉你。

description.original: I have a cowl and I'm a wizard, but I'm not a Cowled Wizard. Got it?
description.display: 我有一件斗篷，并且我是一名法师，但我不是那个斗篷法师。明白吗？

description.original: I'm ready for anything. Which is good when you're with Minsc.
description.display: 我时刻准备面对一切。当你和明斯克在一起时，这是必须的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Imoen is a surprisingly cheerful young woman considering she eventually discovered that she was the child of a deadly murder god. As an orphan, she moved to Candlekeep at the age of 10 with her adoptive father and innkeeper, Winthrop. She eventually traveled to Baldur's Gate with a childhood friend, where she joined forces with powerful Champions like Minsc and Jaheira.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Imoen is a Support Healing Champion who is extra powerful when there are many favored foes about.

event_upgrades.name: Perseverance
event_upgrades.description: Imoen increases her support buffs when Favored Foes appear or are defeated

event_upgrades.name: Polymorph
event_upgrades.description: Before every third attack, Imoen polymorphs a non-boss enemy into her Favored Foe.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 尽管最终发现自己是某个致命杀神的孩子，但伊梦依然是个极其活泼的年轻女子。作为一名孤儿，她在 10 岁时和养父兼旅店老板温斯洛普一起搬到了烛堡。后来，她与一位儿时好友一起来到博德之门，并在那里与明斯克和贾希拉等强大的勇士队成为盟友。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 伊梦是一名支援治疗型勇士。当附近存在大量偏好对手时，她会变得格外强大。

event_upgrades.name: 不屈不挠
event_upgrades.description: 当偏好对手出现或被击败时，伊梦的支援增益效果提高

event_upgrades.name: 变形术
event_upgrades.description: 每发动三次攻击之前，伊梦将一个非首领的敌人变形为她的偏好对手。

She prioritizes enemies with hits-based health and deals 5 hits per attack; if no hits-based enemies are available she deals normal ultimate damage to enemies she attacks.

display.name: 魔法护甲

display.name: 强化！
display.description: 那些箭不会自动停止，那就给它们设置障碍吧。

display.name: 我能举起书

display.name: 一线希望
display.description: 这不是最糟的！

display.name: 灵吸怪蝌蚪
display.description: 嗯，这还真是既有意思又可怕……

original.name: Prodigal Leader

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 我永远不会放弃战斗！

original.name: Orphan's Sword
original.description: Ah, fond memories.

display.name: 孤儿之剑
display.description: 啊，多么美好的回忆。

original.name: Candlekeep Toy
original.description: I grew up among the monks of Candlekeep, but that doesn't mean I didn't train.

display.name: 烛堡玩具
display.description: 我在烛堡的武僧中长大，但这并不意味着我没有受过训练。

original.name: Blade of Defense
original.description: Sometimes the best defense is a sword you're ready to use.

display.name: 防御之刃
display.description: 有时候最好的防御是你随时准备使用的剑。

original.name: Sword of Power
original.description: Everything's better with some magic added in!

display.name: 力量之剑
display.description: 加点魔法，一切都会更好！

original.name: Child's Bow
original.description: I used to practice by aiming at empty inkpots!

display.name: 孩童之弓
display.description: 我以前常常瞄准空墨水瓶练习射击！

original.name: Archer-in-Training
original.description: I won't say I was a prodigy, but I was no slouch with the bow.

display.name: 实习弓箭手
display.description: 我不准备自称神童，但我对弓箭并不陌生。

original.name: Trusty Shortbow
original.description: Let's start with an arrow before we move on to magic missiles.

display.name: 嗜血短弓
display.description: 先从射箭开始，以后再讨论魔法飞弹。

original.name: Protector of the Dryads Bow
original.description: I don't know of a shortbow more powerful than this one.

display.name: 树妖之弓的卫士
display.description: 我没见过比它更厉害的短弓。

original.name: Safety Arrow
original.description: If you aim just right, you can get it to stick on a monk's forehead!

display.name: 安全箭矢
display.description: 如果你瞄得够准，就能把它贴在武僧的额头上！

original.name: Practice Bolt
original.description: They don't let kids in Candlekeep have sharp weapons.

display.name: 练习弩箭
display.description: 他们不允许烛堡的孩子拥有锋利的武器。

original.name: Quiver of Arrows
original.description: Always keep it full, in case you don't want to waste a spell.

display.name: 箭囊
display.description: 如果不想浪费法术，那就记得把它装满。

original.name: Arrows of Slaying
original.description: I have one for beasts, one for dragons, one for aberrations, one for monstrosities...

display.name: 杀戮箭矢
display.description: 一支给兽类，一支给龙族，一支给异怪，一支给怪兽......

original.name: Magic Scroll
original.description: The first time I found one of these, I thought maybe there was a funny story in it.

display.name: 魔法卷轴
display.description: 第一次找到这种卷轴时，我以为里面写着有趣的故事。

original.name: Recorded Spell
original.description: There's something about magic that calls to me.

display.name: 记录法术
display.description: 我对魔法有一种感应。

original.name: Necessary Components
original.description: The cocoons are cheap, but seasonal. The diamond dust is year-round but PRICY.

display.name: 必要元素
display.description: 茧很便宜，但有季节性。钻石尘虽然全年有货，但价格昂贵。

original.name: Tome of Magic
original.description: I've so many good spells in here.

display.name: 魔力巨著
display.description: 这里记着很多好用的法术。

original.name: Makeshift Lockpicks
original.description: When you don't give a child lockpicks, they start experimenting.

display.name: 临时开锁器
display.description: 如果不给孩子开锁器，他们就会自己实验。

original.name: Thief-in-Training
original.description: You can pick a lock with a sewing needle if you're patient. And the lock's not great.

display.name: 实习窃贼
display.description: 你可以用缝纫针撬开一把锁，只要有耐心。并且锁不复杂。

original.name: Tools of the Trade
original.description: I've got everything I need here.

display.name: 谋生的工具
display.description: 我需要的一切都在身上。

original.name: Master Thief's Set
original.description: There's not a lock made I can't crack with these.

display.name: 盗贼大师的工具
display.description: 借助这些工具，世上没有我打不开的锁。

original.name: Precious Necklace
original.description: This old thing? I probably stole it.

display.name: 珍贵的项链
display.description: 这件旧东西？可能是我偷的。

original.name: Jeweled Keepsake
original.description: Some memories are private. I'll tell you later.

display.name: 珠宝纪念品
display.description: 有些回忆非常私密。我以后再告诉你。

original.name: Hooded Cloak
original.description: I have a cowl and I'm a wizard, but I'm not a Cowled Wizard. Got it?

display.name: 兜帽斗篷
display.description: 我有一件斗篷，并且我是一名法师，但我不是那个斗篷法师。明白吗？

original.name: Trickster's Armor
original.description: I'm ready for anything. Which is good when you're with Minsc.

display.name: 骗子的护甲
display.description: 我时刻准备面对一切。当你和明斯克在一起时，这是必须的。

使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
